game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Broken Sword: Reforged**: Broken Sword: Reforged is a classic point-and-click adventure game where players guide protagonist George Stobbart through a linear narrative by interacting with static 2D environments. Players tap on interactive hotspots to examine objects, collect inventory items, initiate dialogue with NPCs, or move George to new areas within a scene. The inventory is accessed via a dedicated icon, allowing players to drag and drop collected items onto environmental elements or combine them with other inventory items to solve a variety of logic-based puzzles. Progression is driven by successfully solving these puzzles, which often require multiple steps and careful observation, unlocking new locations and advancing the overarching mystery. The game features no direct failure states, allowing unlimited attempts at puzzles, and players can unlock achievements for specific story milestones or creative puzzle solutions.
game_info.description: Guide George Stobbart through a mysterious investigation by exploring scenes, collecting items, and solving puzzles. Interact with objects and NPCs to gather clues and inventory items. Combine items creatively to overcome obstacles and unlock new areas. Progress through the story by solving increasingly complex puzzles that reveal the truth behind the mystery. No failure states—explore freely and experiment with different item combinations!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move George left/right or navigate between scenes
Space: Interact with highlighted objects/NPCs or use selected inventory item
Z: Open/close inventory menu
Arrow Keys (in inventory): Select different inventory items
Shift: Examine selected inventory item for hints
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. Validates that George can move around the scene, approach objects, and trigger interaction hotspots. Tests the fundamental navigation and interaction mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move George systematically across the first scene, approaching each visible object. Trigger interactions with all hotspots to ensure the interaction system works correctly. Verify position updates and collision detection.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: George should successfully navigate to all areas of the scene without clipping through boundaries. All interactive objects should respond to interactions. The test succeeds when all basic movement and interaction mechanics are validated without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete game win condition test. Tests the optimal path through all puzzles to reach the final win state. Validates the entire puzzle chain, item collection, inventory management, and scene progression.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Execute the optimal puzzle solution sequence: collect key items, combine them correctly, use them in the right order on the correct hotspots, and progress through all scenes. Navigate efficiently between locations and interact with NPCs in the correct order to unlock the final area.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all puzzle sequences, unlock all scenes, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test succeeds when the win screen is displayed with all achievements unlocked, demonstrating that the complete game is solvable.
